test_scenario: GitHub-native recording of Phase 6 approval, Phase 7 task graph, Phase 8 implementation log

findings.approval_location: Explicit comment on plan issue body
findings.task_graph_location: YAML in task-graph issue body (NOT separate artifact subissue)
findings.implementation_log_location: Comments on individual task issues (one per RED/GREEN/REFACTOR)

comment_template.header: Approved. Proceed with the implementation plan captured in this issue.
comment_template.machine_data: kind: approval, phase: plan, status: approved, approved_by: human, approved_at: ISO8601

phase_6_approval.gate_d_condition_2: Plan issue contains explicit approval comment from human

phase_7_task_graph.stored_as: YAML in task-graph issue body (fenced block)
phase_7_task_graph.not_stored_as: Separate artifact subissue or local file
phase_7_task_graph.issue_hierarchy_rule: For Phase 7 specifically, keep YAML in phase issue body. Do NOT create separate task-graph.yaml artifact subissue.
gate_e_conditions: At least one implementation task issue has stage: red
Every implementation task issue has explicit dependency list

phase_8_implementation_log.workflow_statement: The task issue comments replace 07-implementation-log.md, and the issue body remains the durable record of the slice's current/final stage.

comment_per_stage.red: Comment with failing test result, machine_data stage: red
comment_per_stage.green: Comment with passing implementation, machine_data stage: green
comment_per_stage.refactor: Comment with cleanup completion, machine_data stage: refactor

comment_template.machine_data: kind: implementation-log, task_id, stage, status, updated_at

old_vs_new_files.new_equivalent_1: Plan approval → comment on phase:plan issue
old_vs_new_files.new_equivalent_2: Task graph → YAML in phase:task-graph issue body
old_vs_new_files.new_equivalent_3: Implementation log → comments on phase:implement task issues

session_resumption.when: Phase 8 starts in fresh session with RESUME=<slug>
session_resumption.gate_d_check: Load plan issue, verify approval comment exists
session_resumption.task_graph_load: Parse YAML from task-graph issue body
session_resumption.implementation_history: Load all comments on each task issue (RED/GREEN/REFACTOR timeline)
session_resumption.canonical_source: GitHub issues and comments (single source of truth)

rule_2_enforcement.description: Phase 0 is only phase that writes durable repo-local workflow artifacts. Phases 1-11 use GitHub issues and comments.

references_cited: SKILL.md line 30 (Rule #2 - no local per-work-item artifacts)
issue-hierarchy.md lines 193 (Phase 7 constraint - YAML in body)
